prs.title: removes stepper from tasks page
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Removing the stepper/breadcrumbs from the tasks page required restructuring route layouts and touching ~11 files across the readiness module, a modest but meaningful refactor.

prs.title: Add Google Tag Manager Integration
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Adding Google Tag Manager is a straightforward integration — two small wrapper components, config updates, and wiring into the root layout with minimal custom logic.

prs.title: adds ANALYTICS_SECRET env var to apprunner
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: This PR bundles multiple significant features — admin data tables, middleware refactor, waitlist flow, readiness thermometer redesign in the slide deck, and infra env var additions — spanning 31+ files and representing substantial architectural breadth.

prs.title: readiness level
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Introducing a readiness level concept touches 10 files across readiness actions, UI editors, and the slide deck but involves only 17 lines of custom additions, suggesting a focused and modest feature addition.

prs.title: Fix: Audit log creation before user login in password reset flow
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: A targeted bug fix ensuring audit log creation is properly sequenced before user login in the password reset flow, touching 3 files with 18 lines of straightforward changes.

prs.title: Join waitlist
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Adding a join-waitlist feature to the slide deck required a new server action, UI wiring across multiple slide components, and a button update — a small but complete end-to-end feature addition.

stories.name: Analytics Infrastructure Setup
stories.rationale: Established the analytics foundation by configuring the analytics secret in the app runner environment and integrating Google Tag Manager to enable user behavior tracking.

stories.name: Business Readiness Level Tracking
stories.rationale: Introduced readiness level functionality and streamlined the tasks page UI by removing the stepper, delivering a cleaner readiness tracking experience for users.

stories.name: Waitlist Enrollment for New Users
stories.rationale: Enabled prospective users to join the platform waitlist, supporting controlled onboarding and growth management.

stories.name: Fix Password Reset Audit Logging
stories.rationale: Resolved a bug where audit log entries were being created before user authentication during the password reset flow, ensuring accurate and secure activity records.
